name: chr2_2p15_p16_polymicrogyria_BPs
description: 2p15-p16.1 microdeletion syndrome region with breakpoints embedded in flanking segmental duplications. Deletions of ~0.6-5.7 Mb produce intellectual disability with bilateral polymicrogyria; smallest-region-of-overlap contains BCL11A, USP34, XPO1, REL.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SDs of 30-80 kb at ~95% identity acting as NAHR substrates for the recurrent ~3-5 Mb deletions; intervening unique segment contains BCL11A, REL, USP34, XPO1.
